creator: joshua.jmjt@gmail.com
text:
libreoffice v 7.4.1.2 Freebsd 13.1-p2

trying to install the plugin Grammalecte-fr-v2.1.2.oxt from libreoffice return error during the installation and status unknown after the process is done, the grammalecte menu option appears but is not effective, and the all thing just don't work. and to have it (the menu) I have to enable the app and restart twice one to have the app appear to be able to enable it and a second time to have the useless menu.

the error returned during the installation process :(com.sun.star.lang.DisposedException) { { { Message = "Binary URP bridge disposed during call", Context = (com.sun.star.uno.XInterface) @80ee64300 } } }

I asked for support before filling this PR and the others person had the same error than me.
